nasb.text: He said, “Your name shall no longer be Jacob, but Israel; for you have striven with God and with men and have prevailed.”

esv.text: Then he said, “Your name shall no longer be called Jacob, but Israel, for you have striven with God and with men, and have prevailed.”

cnv.text: 那人說：“你的名字不要再叫雅各，要叫以色列，因為你與　神與人較力，都得了勝。”

ccb.text: 那人说：“你以后不要再叫雅各了，你要叫以色列，因为你跟上帝和人角力都得胜了。”

csbs.text: 那人说：“你的名字不要再叫雅各，而要叫以色列，因为你已经与神与人较力，并且得胜了。”
